meanings.definition: be compatible, similar or consistent; coincide in their characteristics
examples: The two stories don't agree in many details
The handwriting checks with the signature on the check
The suspect's fingerprints don't match those on the gun

meanings.definition: be equivalent or parallel, in mathematics

examples: My Russian pen pal and I have been corresponding for several years

meanings.definition: take the place of or be parallel or equivalent to
examples: Because of the sound changes in the course of history, an 'h' in Greek stands for an 's' in Latin
all rights carry with them corresponding responsibilities

meanings.definition: similar especially in position or purpose
examples: a number of corresponding diagonal points
the like period of the preceding year
